title: Supply Chain Manager - DHL India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - DHL India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at DHL India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Supply Chain Manager to strengthen our Aurangabad-based team.

About DHL India:
DHL India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DHL India!
